rationale: The citing paper is centrally about expectancy effects and who is more susceptible (individual-difference moderators), while the cited paper specifically develops trait-based expectation management (disconfirmation sensitivity/perfectionism) and expectation–satisfaction dynamics, making it a plausible conceptual source rather than a purely incidental mention. Although the raw match is only a single DOI reference without local citation context, the construct overlap in the notes is strong enough to justify second-stage relation judgment.
